title: French Pilaf with Garlic and Herbs
description: A simple and aromatic side dish made with French bread, herbs, and a touch of garlic. It's perfect for accompanying your favorite meals.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the bread with the olive oil until evenly coated.
Add the garlic, parsley, and thyme to the bowl and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pilaf to the bowl and mix until the bread is evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
